description: Composition Solid black jeans made of a cotton-lycra blend fabric, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, fabric tape lining on the inseam of the waistband, brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back, and a button and zipper fly Fit Slim Wash care Wash separately inside out Do not dry clean Do not iron Denims are the perfectly comfortable bottoms and should ideally be voted as the "bottom wear of the millennium". locomotive brings forth its collection of uber cool and ultra comfy denims, which look great on any frame. Pair these black jeam from locomotive with t-shirts, canvas or sneakers for an ultimate denim look. After all, the cotton-lycra blend fabric is crafted to flatter your silhouette while you chill out in style! Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
